title: alsine umbellata
intro: Alsine umbellata, also known as Creeping Jenny or Coin-flower, is a flowering plant species in the family Primulaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Alsine umbellata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
